message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Login Sequence GET

actor "customer" as Customer
participant "Tomcat" as Tomcat

rectangle "entries (UI)" {
    participant "Index" as Index
    participant "BaseServlet" as BaseServlet
    participant "index.jsp" as indexJsp
    participant "Login" as Login
    participant "login.jsp" as loginJsp
}

Customer -> Tomcat: 1 GET /
activate Tomcat
Tomcat -> Index: 2 doGet()
activate Index
Index -> BaseServlet: 3 render()
activate BaseServlet
BaseServlet -> indexJsp: 4 forward()
activate indexJsp
indexJsp -> Login: 5 doGet()
activate Login
Login --> BaseServlet: 6 render()
deactivate Login
BaseServlet -> loginJsp: 7 forward()
activate loginJsp
loginJsp --> Customer: 8 result
deactivate loginJsp
deactivate BaseServlet
deactivate indexJsp
deactivate Index
deactivate Tomcat

@enduml
```
